{{Quote|The lush forests of Krant are beautiful from the cockpit of an X-wing. They stretch on for miles. But it's quite a different thing to be tramping through them on foot. That's why I'm a pilot, lads.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
'''Krant''' was a wilderness [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It saw action from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] hid on Krant during decades until Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] appeared on the planet, searching for the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Utric Sandov]].

==Description==
[[File:Xwing_krant.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] on the forests of Krant.]]
Krant was characterized by temperate forests and cliffs. The trees of Krant were a spectacular multi-colored variety, which glowed in the diffuse sunsets and shed their enormous leaves in two seasonal cycles. The predators of Krant were few and far between, leaving a large ecological niche in which herbivores and insects thrive. The Krantian songbirds filled the night sky with their calls and melodies, making for a bucolic, if noisy, setting for the newly-arrived colonists.<ref name="DataBank">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' Databank</ref>

Its two major [[City/Legends|cities]], [[Peche]] and [[Theenes]], were agricultural in nature. [[Le'Roche]], another city, was on an island.<ref name="SW:GB" /> Krant had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and numerous orbiting [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] that were caught in its [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]]. One of the main moons, [[Aereen]], was mineral-rich.<ref name="CC" /> By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="EA time">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon|Battle of New Geddes]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> one of the asteroids, Geddes, had been terraformed and renamed [[Hanoon]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==History==
[[File:Rebels_krant.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] in the forests of Krant.]]
[[Human/Legends|Humans]] and Bothans colonized the world shortly before the Clone Wars, and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] established a colony there which the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] destroyed as she set up a [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] on Krant<ref name="CC" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC 1">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] campaign in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> The surviving Wookiees helped Echuu Shen-Jon [[Battle of Krant|destroy]] Tann's fortress. Shen-Jon felt he gave into the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] when he killed Tann, and exiled himself on Krant.<ref name="CC" />

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later Krant became a major rendezvous point for Bothan spies and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] during the Galactic Civil War. It was scouted several times by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a possible base, endangering the [[Krantian Civil War|Rebel operations]] there.<ref name="SW:GB" /> [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]] was placed in charge of Krant, and became known as the Butcher of Krant, after [[Death/Legends|killing]] thousands of [[Krantian/Legends|Krantians]] on charges of [[Politics/Legends|political]] [[Treason/Legends|treason]].<ref name="DataBank" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="NEC 2">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places Organa's mission to Krant between [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].</ref> the Empire took over the Alliance's [[Ghost Base]], which was subsequently liberated, along with Peche and Theenes, by an Alliance strike force led by Shen-Jon and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]—whose ship, the ''[[Cretacian]]'', had [[Skirmish in the Krant system|crashed]] on the planet previously. Organa then completed her mission, meeting with the Bothan spy [[Utric Sandov]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

There were also abandoned [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Temple (Krant)|temples]] and ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ruins on the planet.<ref name="CC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Krant was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', released a week before the game itself. 

The game's Databank mistakenly claims Krant is found 'in the center of [[Both system]]'; a mission briefing of the game suggests instead that Krant is in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] which is also a mistake, as Both system is in the[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' resolved the mistakes, establishing that Krant belongs to the [[Krant system/Legends|Krant system]], located in the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]].

Krant appears again during the Echuu Shen-Jon campaign mission in the [[2002]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''. In one of the campaign missions, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] can be seen by a Sith Temple on Krant, an Easter Egg for the game, but this was not at the time Anakin was falling to the dark side, reducing this to a non-canonical easter egg. The scene is hidden in a corner of the map.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Imo}}
